projectDescription: A Selenium 4 + Cucumber 7 BDD test automation framework in Java 21 that validates the RIU Hotels & Resorts website's user registration flow using the Page Object Model pattern.
keyFeatures: Selenium 4 with built-in driver management (no manual ChromeDriver setup)
Cucumber 7 BDD with Gherkin feature files for readable test scenarios
Page Object Model (POM) with BasePage providing safe, wait-backed Selenium wrappers
PicoContainer dependency injection for sharing WebDriver across step definitions
Allure reporting integration with rich HTML test reports including step-level details
TestNG runner with tag-based test execution (@smoke filter)
AspectJ weaving for Allure step annotation capture
Cross-platform test execution (Unix shell + Windows batch scripts for Allure CLI)
publicApiSurface: BasePage#find(By) — wait for visibility and return WebElement
BasePage#click(By) — wait for clickability and click element
BasePage#type(By, String) — clear and type text into an input field
BasePage#getText(By) — get visible text of an element
BasePage#isDisplayed(By) — safe boolean visibility check
BasePage#isClickable(By) — safe boolean clickability check
BasePage#navigateTo(String) — navigate the browser to a URL
TestContext#driver — shared WebDriver instance across all step classes
RiuHome#navigateToRiu() — navigate to the RIU Hotels homepage
RiuHome#clickAcceptCookies() — click the cookie consent banner
RiuHome#clickRegister() — click the RIU pro access/register button
LoginModal#clickRegisterTab() — switch to the registration tab in the modal
LoginModal#typeNameTextBox(String) — fill the first name field
LoginModal#typeSurnameTextBox(String) — fill the surname field
LoginModal#typeEmailTextBox(String) — fill the email field
LoginModal#selectArgentina() — select Argentina from the country dropdown
LoginModal#clickCalendar() — open the birth date calendar picker
LoginModal#clickNoDate() — skip birth date selection
LoginModal#selectMale() — select male gender
LoginModal#clickSalesInfoRadioButton() — opt-in for commercial information
LoginModal#clickAcceptConditionsCheck() — check the terms and conditions checkbox
LoginModal#clickSubmitButton() — submit the registration form
LoginModal#isReqFielVisible() — assert birth date required-field validation error is shown
@smoke tag — Cucumber tag filter used by TestRunner to select scenarios for execution
